expected_tangles.about: Ravi inserts a rate_limit stanza into gateway/routes.yaml depending on the existing location-block order; Lena is reordering and collapsing the location blocks in the same file in the same window — incompatible edits to one file, order-dependent
Sun writes onboarding docs and edits example config snippets in the README; surface overlap on 'config' but touches no live service config — no shared resource with Ravi or anyone
Omar upgrades the test framework (CI YAML + *_test.go) and Theo refactors internal/log; both 'backend', both touch many files, but disjoint trees and no shared resource
both mention 'CI'/'config'/'deploy' in passing — surface tokens only, Omar's CI YAML and Ravi's gateway config are unrelated files
